Off Calendar Aug-23-2022 Off Calendar

Petition To Determine Persons Entitled To Distribution Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-27-2022 Granted Per Written Order

Petitioner And Heir Suzanne Patty Johnsons Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Mar-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Azita Rahim, via zoom, for American Research Bureau, Assignee; Cameren Ripoli, via zoom, for Suzanne Johnson, Petitioner; Brianna Mannion, via zoom, for the San Francisco Public Administrator("SFPA"), Personal Representative.

The court acknowledges the Statement of Interest filed by the SFPA and asks whether it can be construed as an opposition. Ms. Mannion provides oral testimony regarding the SFPA's intent. The court points Ms. Mannion to its position and its intent to follow probate code. Mr. Ripoli advises that he agrees with the SFPA's position.

After additional discussion, the Petition to Determine Distribution Rights is submitted.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Teebay. Not reported.

Petitioner And Heir Suzanne Patty Johnsons Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Mar-02-2022 Continued To Mar-28-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petitioner And Heir Suzanne Patty Johnsons Petition To Determine Distribution Rights
Off Calendar Feb-02-2022 Continued To Mar-02-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Cameren Ripoli, via ZOOM, for Suzanne Johnson, Petitioner; Azita Rahim, via ZOOM, for American Research Bureau, Assignee; Brianna Mannion, via ZOOM, for the San Francisco Public Administrator (SFPA), Personal Representative.

The court asks if anyone is appearing to object to this petition. Ms. Rahim advises that she is not objecting but asks for a continuance to file a joint statement from her and the SFPA. Ms. Mannion provides background regarding Ms. Rahim's request and agrees to a continuance of the matter to allow time to file the joint statement. The court confirms with Mr. Ripoli that he does not oppose the request for a continuance.

After additional discussion, the Petition on today's calendar is continued to Mar-02-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Obilinatto. Not reported.

REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (315 Raymond Ave, San Francisco, Ca 94134)
Off Calendar Sep-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion, via ZOOM, for San Francisco Public Administrator's Office, Administrator; Evan Winet, via ZOOM, for American Research Bureau, Interested Party.

The sale was confirmed at $825,000 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property (subject to review of the order). Bond is waived.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Feb-24-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Brianna Mannion appeared for San Francisco Public Administrator.
David Brillant appeared by telephone Suzanne Johnson (Heir) known as Eileen Cash in the petition.
Sky Allerton (Decedent's Granddaughter) in Propria Persona.
Sandra Stumbug also present.

Mr. Brillant stated that his Client's position is to grant, that he and his Client had a good conversation with Counsel and that his Client supports the appointment of the Public Administrator. Ms. Allerton stated that she is not objecting. The Court stated that the issue is that the will is not-self proving given the language in the will, that Counsel has provided evidence and that it is satisfied that the documents that were filed reflect what Ms. Cash intended to be her last will and testament. The Court granted the Petition for Letters of Administration with Will Annexed. The will dated March 25, 1961 is admitted to probate. The Public Administrator is appointed as the Administrator of the estate with full authority. Bond is not required. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for August 23, 2022 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The Court informed the parties that it expects the estate to be closed by then and that a petition for final distribution, or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by one week before the hearing. Ms. Stumberg stated that she had some questions. Ms. Mannion instructed Ms. Stumburg to contact the Estate Investigator (Conner).

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: K. Kabasares. Not reported.

EX PARTE PETITION FOR LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Feb-02-2021 Granted Per Written Order
